note: Status snapshot at end of day 2026-07-02. See SPEC.md for product spec, docs/ROADMAP.md for full epic detail, docs/LICENSES.md for soundfont/license facts. Resume by reading this file first.

title: Project Foundation
summary: apps/web (Vite) + apps/api (Fastify) scaffolded. Dockerfile (multi-stage, node:20-alpine + fluidsynth + ffmpeg) builds and runs. docker-compose.yml for local dev. /api/health working.

title: Upload & Job System
summary: POST /api/render (multipart), GET /api/render/:jobId, GET /api/files/:jobId/:filename (Range-enabled). Path-safe by construction (generated jobId, fixed filenames, allow-list). Upgraded fastify 4->5 (+@fastify/static 9, @fastify/multipart 10) to fix a real high-severity CVE with no 4.x patch. Verified via curl and inside the real Docker container: happy path + all rejection cases (bad ext/empty/oversized/invalid XML/unknown jobId/disallowed filename).

title: Render Pipeline
summary: Verovio (MusicXML->MIDI) + FluidSynth (MIDI->WAV, correct arg order) + FFmpeg (WAV->MP3) wired into renderWorker.js, fires from POST /api/render without blocking. render.log written per job. SoundFont: FreePats CC-BY 3.0 Salamander Grand Piano V3 .sf2, checksum-pinned in renderer/scripts/download-soundfont.sh (sha256 15edb061d7ba60d58332f72dba8f8ce40988048cc703f935e6320f37d650e213). Extracted size is 1.27GB (not the ~300-400MB originally estimated) -> production image ends up ~1.4GB, accepted for V1, revisit if Render free tier struggles. Verified with a REAL render inside the built Docker image: job completed in ~5.7s, ffmpeg volumedetect confirmed real audio (mean -48.1dB, max -26.3dB, not silence).

title: QA & Failure Rules
summary: File existence + non-zero size checks are already implicitly done inside renderWorker.js (assertNonEmpty after each step causes a failed job). NOT yet done: duration check (>1s), silence detection, clipping detection, and writing qa:{...} into metadata.json (currently always null). Must enforce: never mark completed if a required check fails (SPEC.md section 23).
next: Add a qaService.js that inspects output.wav (duration/silence/clipping) after step 2, before proceeding to MP3, and write results into job.qa in renderWorker.js.

title: Frontend
summary: apps/web currently only has a placeholder page that pings /api/health. Need: upload UI, all required UI states, status polling, audio preview player (verify Range/seek works against the already-Range-enabled /api/files), download buttons, render log panel, error display, SoundFont attribution footer.
next: Start with UploadPanel.js + apiClient.js calling POST /api/render, then RenderStatus.js polling GET /api/render/:jobId.

title: Security & Hardening
summary: Mostly landed already alongside Epic 1/2: path traversal prevention (safePath.js + allow-lists), argument-array child_process calls (no shell injection risk), upload size limit enforced and tested, RENDER_TIMEOUT_SECONDS already passed to execFileAsync's timeout option in audioRenderService.js. NOT yet done: RENDER_CONCURRENCY cap -- render.routes.js currently fires runRenderJob() unbounded on every upload, no semaphore/queue limiting concurrent renders.
next: Add a small concurrency limiter (e.g. a counting semaphore) around runRenderJob dispatch in render.routes.js, capped by appConfig.renderConcurrency.

title: Deploy (Render.com + GitHub)
summary: Not started. Depends on Epics 0-5 all being done first (Epic 3, 4, and the concurrency part of Epic 5 remain).
next: Push repo to GitHub, connect to a Render Web Service (Docker deploy), confirm free-tier resources handle a render (watch out for the ~1.4GB image size), smoke test the live URL.

title: Docker image size risk
summary: Production image is ~1.4GB because the full 16-velocity-layer Salamander .sf2 is 1.27GB. Untested against Render's actual free-tier build/pull time and disk limits.
next: During Epic 6, if Render struggles with image size or build time, look at a reduced-velocity-layer Salamander conversion or a smaller alternative soundfont.
